title: Bajaj Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Electricals is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
